vocab.meaning: cảnh tượng hùng vĩ đến ngỡ ngàng
vocab.example: I am always compelled to whip out my camera whenever I encounter awe-inspiring vistas in the highlands.

vocab.meaning: kể chuyện thông qua hình ảnh
vocab.example: For me, taking scenery pictures is a form of visual storytelling that documents my journey across the globe.

vocab.meaning: hậu kỳ (chỉnh sửa ảnh sau khi chụp)
vocab.example: While the raw shot is important, post-processing allows me to enhance the natural colors of a sunset.
I have a soft spot for urban scenery, especially capturing the geometric patterns formed by modern skyscrapers.

vocab.meaning: phong cảnh tĩnh lặng, bình yên
vocab.example: There is nothing more therapeutic than photographing a tranquil landscape at the crack of dawn.

vocab.meaning: giờ vàng (thời điểm ánh sáng đẹp nhất để chụp ảnh)
vocab.example: I usually wait for the golden hour to ensure my photos have that warm, ethereal glow.

vocab.meaning: bố cục lộn xộn, rối mắt
vocab.example: I try to avoid a cluttered composition by focusing on a single, striking element in the scenery.

vocab.meaning: vẻ đẹp phù du, chóng tàn
vocab.example: Photography is the only way to seize the ephemeral beauty of a rainbow before it vanishes.
Using a panoramic lens helps me capture the full scale of the mountain ranges without cropping out any detail.

vocab.meaning: điểm nhìn thuận lợi (thường ở trên cao)
vocab.example: We hiked to a high vantage point to get an unobstructed view of the valley below.
